mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources ( resource_type, title, description, link, skills_json, level_tag, difficulty_tag, location_tag, category_tag, time_range_tag, duration_text ) VALUES ( #{resourceType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{link}, #{skillsJson}, #{levelTag}, #{difficultyTag}, #{locationTag}, #{categoryTag}, #{timeRangeTag}, #{durationText} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resources SET resource_type = #{resourceType}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, link = #{link}, skills_json = #{skillsJson}, level_tag = #{levelTag}, difficulty_tag = #{difficultyTag}, location_tag = #{locationTag}, category_tag = #{categoryTag}, time_range_tag = #{timeRangeTag}, duration_text = #{durationText}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, resource_type, title, description, link, skills_json, level_tag, difficulty_tag, location_tag, category_tag, time_range_tag, duration_text, created_at, updated_at FROM resources WHERE id = #{id}
